channel.title: Mimp on TRISPECTIVE
channel.description: Recent content in Mimp on TRISPECTIVE

item.description: Union Budget: Loan & Interest Concepts ![[is_image_me_202603251235.png]] 1. The Domestic & External Borrowing Paradox The Government of India frequently issues sovereign bonds1 to the public and borrows from international bodies to bridge its fiscal deficit. Question: How is the principal amount of this borrowing classified differently from the annual interest payments made on it? Explain the core financial logic behind treating the “principal” and the “cost of capital” in completely different categories of the budget.
